prompt:
A sturdy woodworking workbench is taking shape in the center of a shop, with thick legs, a solid top, and a lower shelf already assembled. Dog holes are being marked or drilled along the top, and a heavy front vise or clamp system is being bolted into place on one corner. Various hand tools, clamps, and a measuring tape lie on the surface, making it clear this bench is being built to support many future projects.

The environment is a bright, near-future maker space with a solarpunk aesthetic: high windows or skylights provide soft daylight, complemented by subtle LED strips, and there are hints of other stations—electronics, plants, or 3D printers—in the blurred background. The 512×512 photorealistic composition centers the workbench and the hands tightening bolts, with no brand logos or readable labels. Only arms and hands are shown, capturing the moment when a simple set of boards becomes a dedicated, sturdy workbench for all the builds to come.
